title: Pink Eyed Totem
description: Pink Coloured Eyed Totem that makes your totems eyes be the amazing colour pink
body: A mystical Minecraft totem infused with bright pink energy that glows from its eyes. This rare totem gives off a soft, enchanted aura, as if filled with powerful magic ready to protect its holder. The vibrant pink eyes shine through the carved wooden face, making it look both mysterious and legendary. When held, the totem feels alive with warm, pulsing light, and when activated, it releases a burst of pink sparkles as it saves the player from danger. Perfect for pink-themed builds, custom packs, or any magical aesthetic.
